nodes.name: DragDebugView.swift
nodes.summary: DEBUG-only isolated drag-gesture test view: a draggable circle plus an event log to confirm DragGesture fires and hit-testing is not blocked.
nodes.languageNotes: Wrapped in #if DEBUG with a #Preview for canvas-only use.

nodes.name: DragDebugView
nodes.summary: Debug View with a draggable circle driven by DragGesture and a rolling on-screen event log for diagnosing gesture/hit-testing issues.

nodes.name: AcknowledgementRecord.swift
nodes.summary: SwiftData @Model recording that a user tapped through the 3-card ground-rules modal in The Opener; a device-only legal/ethical record with copy versioning.

nodes.name: AcknowledgementRecord
nodes.summary: @Model storing acknowledgement timestamp, copy version, and which ground-rule statements were tapped; computed isCurrent re-prompts when copy version increments.

nodes.name: Card.swift
nodes.summary: Read-only Codable content model for a single prompt card loaded from JSON, with derived flags (reveal mechanic, context beat, ceremonial, living) plus The Opener sample data.
nodes.languageNotes: Content layer is never stored in SwiftData; the String cardId is the only join to the progress layer.

nodes.name: Card
nodes.summary: Codable, Identifiable struct describing a prompt card (text, intensity, type, gendering, context beat) with derived booleans for reveal/ceremonial/living classification.

nodes.name: CardSession.swift
nodes.summary: SwiftData @Models for deck-play tracking: couple-owned CardSession, per-card CardResult outcomes, and the unlinked-user SoloSession prep deck.

nodes.name: CardSession
nodes.summary: @Model for one couple-owned sitting with a deck — tracks pass number, attempt/discuss/skip/bookmark counts, Lock-In bandwidth, and cascades CardResult children.

nodes.name: CardResult
nodes.summary: @Model recording the outcome (discussed/skipped/bookmarked) of a single card within a session; String cardId joins to the JSON content layer.

nodes.name: SoloSession
nodes.summary: @Model for an unlinked user's 5-card solo prep deck session, owned by userId and retained as permanent history after a partner is linked.

nodes.name: CompanionCard.swift
nodes.summary: Stub Codable model for a Desire Map companion card that bridges a match into a next-step conversation prompt and optional suggested deck.

nodes.name: CompanionCard
nodes.summary: Codable, Identifiable, Hashable struct linking a DesireMatch (via bridgeCardId) to a conversation prompt and an optional suggested deck.

nodes.name: Couple.swift
nodes.summary: SwiftData @Model for a linked partner connection — owns the shared safe word, entitlement tier, Desire Map reveal state, and cascading session/match/progress relationships.
nodes.languageNotes: Entitlement lives on Couple so one purchase covers both partners; dissolution archives rather than deletes.

nodes.name: Couple
nodes.summary: @Model holding the two partner IDs, connection plan, shared safe word, entitlement tier/unlock metadata, and cascade relationships to DesireMatch, CardSession, and DeckProgress.

nodes.name: Deck.swift
nodes.summary: Read-only Codable content model for a deck loaded from JSON, with entitlement gating, gender-dynamic card filtering, ordering, and ritual-presence helpers.

nodes.name: Deck
nodes.summary: Codable, Identifiable deck struct holding metadata and its cards; methods gate availability by AccessTier and filter/sort cards by GenderDynamic and sortOrder.

nodes.name: DeckProgress.swift
nodes.summary: SwiftData @Model tracking a couple's resume position through a deck across sittings (current card index, unwrapped flag, first-opened/completed dates).

nodes.name: DeckProgress
nodes.summary: @Model keyed by coupleId + String deckId persisting mid-deck resume index and ceremonial-unwrap state; distinct from per-card CardResult.

nodes.name: DesireItem.swift
nodes.summary: Codable model for a single cohort-adaptive Desire Map prompt loaded from JSON, with per-track answer strings (weight-ordered) and cohort-appearance helpers.
nodes.languageNotes: Only the answer weight (index) is ever stored/synced; the displayed string is cohort-specific copy.

nodes.name: DesireItem
nodes.summary: Codable, Identifiable, Hashable struct describing a desire prompt (category, sensitivity, tracks, per-track answers) with answers(for:) and appears(in:) lookups.

nodes.name: DesireMatch.swift
nodes.summary: SwiftData @Model for a server-computed mutual/adjacent Desire Map match; reveal state and free-reveal flag are Edge-Function-authoritative to keep the paywall un-bypassable.
nodes.languageNotes: Contains no individual ratings — only confirmed mutual positives computed server-side.

nodes.name: DesireMatch
nodes.summary: @Model holding coupleId, itemId, match type, and reveal state; isFreeReveal/revealedAt are set only by the Edge Function, with bridgeCardId linking to a CompanionCard.

nodes.name: DesireRating.swift
nodes.summary: SwiftData @Models for the app's most sensitive data: per-user private DesireMapEntry ratings (notForMe never syncs) and the couple-level DesireMapStatus completion/reveal tracker.
nodes.languageNotes: Three-layer enforcement (Swift filter + Edge Function + RLS) keeps notForMe ratings on-device and partner-inaccessible. Despite the file name, it defines DesireMapEntry and DesireMapStatus.

nodes.name: DesireMapEntry
nodes.summary: @Model storing one user's private rating for a desire item; userId never crosses to the partner and isSyncable excludes notForMe so the sacred boundary never leaves the device.

nodes.name: DesireMapStatus
nodes.summary: @Model tracking per-couple Desire Map completion booleans and reveal state (both readable by partners) plus an explicit waitingStateSince powering the 7-day timer.

nodes.name: EntitlementRecord.swift
nodes.summary: SwiftData @Models for purchase records: couple-level EntitlementRecord (Core unlock, founding-member, lifetime/expiry) and the permanent $7.99 ConnectionEntitlement.
nodes.languageNotes: Receipt validation is server-side via Edge Function; purchasedBy is support-only and never shown to either partner.

nodes.name: EntitlementRecord
nodes.summary: @Model recording a Core-unlock StoreKit purchase for a couple, with founding-member, active, and lifetime/expiry computed state.

nodes.name: ConnectionEntitlement
nodes.summary: @Model for a permanent $7.99 additional-connection purchase with no expiry, surviving relationship dissolution.
